title: Cyphomandra trachyphylla
taxonomy: Cyphomandra trachyphylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the nightshade family. The genus Cyphomandra is a group of flowering plants native to South America, with some species being used as ornamental plants. The classification of Cyphomandra trachyphylla is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Solanales, Family: Solanaceae, Genus: Cyphomandra, Species: C. trachyphylla. This classification shows that Cyphomandra trachyphylla is a member of the nightshade family and is closely related to other flowering plants in the same family. The classification of Cyphomandra trachyphylla is also sometimes listed as Solanum trachyphyllum in older sources, but the current accepted classification is within the genus Cyphomandra.
uses: Cyphomandra trachyphylla is a plant species with reported medicinal uses, including the treatment of various health conditions.
